entries.mnemonic: 由 turn over(翻转)颠倒顺序构成的动词

senses.example: He stood up quickly, overturning his chair.
senses.example_zh: 他猛地站起来，弄翻了椅子。

senses.example: The revolutionist planned to overturn this puppet regime.
senses.example_zh: 革命者计划推翻傀儡政府。

senses.example: The boat overturned.
senses.example_zh: 船翻了。

entries.mnemonic: fert(结果实)+ile→能产果实的→肥沃的

senses.example: There are fertile fields in the Nile Delta.
senses.example_zh: 尼罗河三角洲土地肥沃。

senses.example: Most men remain fertile into old age.
senses.example_zh: 大多数男子直到老年还有生育能力。

senses.example: This successful film is the result of the writer's fertile imagination.
senses.example_zh: 这部成功的电影源自那位作家丰富的想象力。

derivatives: infertile a. 不肥沃的;不结果实的;不生育的

entries.mnemonic: com(共同)+pon(放)+ent(表物)→放到一起→成分

senses.example: Vitamin C is the major component of many fruits and vegetables.
senses.example_zh: 维生素C是很多水果和蔬菜中主要的成分。

senses.def_en: a part of a mechanical or electrical complex
senses.example: A computer consists of thousands of components.
senses.example_zh: 电脑由成千上万个部件组成。

senses.example: Can you resolve it into its component elements?
senses.example_zh: 你能把它分解为组成它的元素吗？

senses.example: dairy products
senses.example_zh: 奶制品

senses.example: He was a typical product of his generation and background.
senses.example_zh: 他是他那一代人和他那种背景的典型产物。

senses.example: The product of 4 multiplied by 5 multiplied by 7 is 140.
senses.example_zh: 4乘5再乘7的积是140。

entries.mnemonic: re(again)+produce(生产)→一再生产→繁殖;复制

senses.def_en: to make a copy of sth.
senses.example: Photos can be reproduced without negatives now.
senses.example_zh: 现在没有底片也可以复制相片。

senses.def_en: to produce babies, young animals, new plants, etc.
senses.example: Most fish reproduce (themselves) by laying eggs.
senses.example_zh: 大多数鱼靠产卵繁殖。

derivatives: producer n. 生产者;制片人

senses.def_en: producing crops, goods, or services, esp. in abundance
senses.example: The productive writer cannot produce any more works now.
senses.example_zh: 此高产作家现在已经是江郎才尽了。

senses.example: My time spent in the library was very productive.
senses.example_zh: 我花在图书馆的时间很有收获。

senses.example: It's said that a person's handwriting can reflect his/her character.
senses.example_zh: 据说，字迹可以反映出人的性格。

senses.example: The sunlight was reflected in the water.
senses.example_zh: 日光由水面反射出来。

senses.example: We are reflecting how to fulfill the task. // I often reflect on the beauty and complexity of life.
senses.example_zh: 我们正考虑如何完成这项任务。我经常思考人生的美丽与复杂。

derivatives: reflection n. 映像;反射;反映;深思

senses.example: The label is on the inner side of the box.
senses.example_zh: 标签贴在盒子内侧。

senses.example: Yoga gives Sally a sense of inner calm.
senses.example_zh: 瑜伽使萨莉感到内心平静。

entries.mnemonic: im+it(它)+ate(吃)→它照着别人的样子吃→模仿
